name: Shrimp Scampi (Jjgf65a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the shrimp, leaving the tails intact.
2. Heat the butter in a broiler-proof pan. Add oil and garlic, stirring to combine.
3. Stir in parsley, cayenne pepper, and lemon juice. Mix well.
4. Add the shrimp, tossing to coat evenly with the sauce.
5. Place the pan under the broiler, 6 inches from heat. Broil until the shrimp are cooked through, about 5 minutes.
6. Check halfway through cooking time and turn the shrimp as needed for even cooking.
7. Serve with crusty bread for dipping in the sauce.
